title: Read capability and preference signals

existingTests.describe: US-004: Read capability and preference signals

tests.name: returns dark when prefers-color-scheme is dark
returns light when prefers-color-scheme is light
returns null prefersColorScheme when matchMedia is unavailable
returns true when prefers-reduced-motion is reduce
returns false when prefers-reduced-motion is not set
returns null prefersReducedMotion when matchMedia is unavailable
returns true for touchCapable when ontouchstart exists
tests.criterion: Read touch capability from available browser APIs

tests.name: returns true for touchCapable when maxTouchPoints > 0
tests.criterion: Read touch capability from available browser APIs

tests.name: returns false for touchCapable when no touch APIs available
tests.criterion: Read touch capability from available browser APIs

relevantToUS004.name: does not access localStorage or sessionStorage
relevantToUS004.criterion: All values stay in memory only

relevantToUS004.name: does not set cookies
relevantToUS004.criterion: All values stay in memory only

relevantToUS004.name: returns object with exactly the expected keys

missingScenarios: returns null prefersColorScheme when neither dark nor light matches (no-preference)

coverageByAcceptanceCriterion.criterion: Read touch capability from available browser APIs
All values stay in memory only
coverageByAcceptanceCriterion.notes: Covered by US-003 describe block (storage spy + cookie spy tests)

suggestedAdditionalTests.name: returns null prefersColorScheme when neither dark nor light matches
suggestedAdditionalTests.rationale: When matchMedia is available but both dark and light queries return false (no-preference or forced-colors), prefersColorScheme should be null

suggestedAdditionalTests.name: returns null touchCapable when matchMedia throws and touch APIs missing
suggestedAdditionalTests.criterion: Read touch capability from available browser APIs
suggestedAdditionalTests.rationale: Validates touchCapable detection is independent of matchMedia errors
suggestedAdditionalTests.skipReason: touchCapable detection does not use matchMedia — ontouchstart/maxTouchPoints path is already fully covered

summary: All 5 acceptance criteria are covered by 11 US-004 tests plus 2 shared US-003 storage-constraint tests. One minor gap exists: no test for the no-preference color-scheme edge case (matchMedia available, both queries false → null). This is a low-risk gap since the code path falls through to the null default.
